title: Adjust subitem name
excerpt:
Hi, 
I just got a customer request to be able to re-name subitems. They are now only able to adjust the title of the main item, but this isn’t available yet for subitems. Will this be on the roadmap any time soon? Thanks…

posts.author: Sophie_Tryve (Sophie Uijterschout)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi,
I just got a customer request to be able to re-name subitems. They are now only able to adjust the title of the main item, but this isn’t available yet for subitems. Will this be on the roadmap any time soon? Thanks!

posts.author: CReilly (Christina Reilly)
posts.cookedHtml:
Can we merge this feature request with similar item to accurately track upvotes?

Edit Group & Subitem Terminology - Feature requests - monday Community Forum
